settings.text: Pioneering Functional Medicine and </br> Personalized Care  empowering your wellness

settings.heading: Trusted Wellness, Personalized Care, Proven Protocols.
settings.paragraph: Living Well Today is a virtual functional medicine clinic offering expert-led consultations, curated supplement protocols, and professional training. Whether you're looking to heal, shop, or collaborate — you're in the right place.

settings.company_description: Living Well Today, established in 1999, pioneers virtual Restorative & Functional Medicine blending clinic-level expertise with modern telehealth. Our evidence-guided, personalized care model integrates non-invasive approaches for 25+ years of empowering health control. Our telehealth services seamlessly blend clinic expertise with modern technology, providing non-invasive approaches for optimal health outcomes.
settings.mission_statement: To redefine chronic care with root-cause, evidence-based protocols delivered through remote consultations and non-invasive testing, pairing functional experts with curated supplements for measurable, lasting results.
settings.vision_statement: To empower individuals to take charge of health with personalized, noninvasive protocols and virtual visits, integrating functional medicine and curated supplementation to restore more vitality and sustain wellbeing.

settings.company_description: We provide comprehensive wellness solutions that integrate seamlessly into your lifestyle, offering personalized health insights, mindfulness programs, and holistic wellness services designed for the modern world.
settings.founding_story: Born from the recognition that traditional healthcare often treats symptoms rather than promoting holistic wellness, our platform was created by wellness experts, technologists, and healthcare professionals united by a common vision of preventive, personalized care.
settings.mission_statement: To democratize wellness by making personalized health and mindfulness solutions accessible to everyone, empowering individuals to achieve optimal well-being through innovative technology and evidence-based practices.
settings.vision_statement: To create a world where wellness is not a luxury but a fundamental right, where every individual has access to the tools, knowledge, and support needed to live their healthiest, most fulfilling life.
settings.wellness_feature_1: Personalized wellness plans based on your unique health profile
settings.wellness_feature_2: 24/7 access to certified wellness coaches and health experts
settings.wellness_feature_3: Evidence-based programs for stress management and mental clarity
settings.wellness_feature_4: Comprehensive tracking and insights for holistic health monitoring

settings.heading: Personalized. Preventive. Primary.
settings.paragraph: For 25 years, Living Well Today has helped thousands find answers, clarity, and real solutions when conventional care fell short. Book a consult, shop premium protocols, or just ask a question—this is true personalized care, for you.

settings.title: Real Wellness. Real Results.
settings.subtitle: Meet the brilliant minds of Living Well Today
settings.expert_1_description: Discover Mike Payne at Living Well Today – Your Expert in Holistic Wellness. With 25+ years' experience, Mike specializes in complex health issues like autoimmune conditions & neurodegenerative disorders.
settings.expert_1_bio:
At Living Well Today, Mike Payne leverages over 25 years of dedicated experience in holistic wellness to guide individuals towards optimal health and vitality. Renowned for his expertise in managing complex health issues, Mike specializes in treating autoimmune conditions, neurodegenerative disorders, Lyme diseased .

As a trailblazer in alternative health and functional medicine. His comprehensive approach addresses a wide range of complex conditions, including autoimmune complications, Lyme disease, various cancers, spectrum disorders, and neurodegenerative diseases.

Mike's commitment to holistic wellness goes beyond merely treating symptoms; he delves into the root causes of health issues to develop personalized, effective treatment plans. His innovative methods and compassionate care have earned him a reputation as a leading expert in the field.
settings.expert_2_description: Elevate Your Well-Being with Aaron Payne at Living Well Today International. With 15+ years of expertise. Explore neurofeedback, and more for personalized care for general wellness. Start your journey today.
settings.expert_2_bio:
Aaron is a dedicated specialist with extensive experience in autism spectrum support. A graduate of Marshall University with a degree in Sports Medicine, Aaron has spent his career combining medical expertise with a deep understanding of neurodivergent care.

Recognized for his unwavering commitment, Aaron has been nominated by Autism One as one of America's top autism practitioners. His compassionate approach and evidence-based strategies have helped countless individuals and families navigate the complexities of autism with confidence and clarity.

Through personalized consultations, Aaron provides expert guidance on interventions, therapies, and lifestyle strategies tailored to each individual’s needs. Whether you're seeking support for autism-related challenges or looking to optimize health and performance through sports medicine, Aaron’s knowledge and dedication make him an invaluable resource.

settings.heading: Meet Our Wellness Experts
settings.subtitle: Our team of certified professionals brings decades of experience in holistic wellness, nutrition, and therapeutic care to guide you on your journey to optimal health.
settings.expert_1_description: With over 15 years of experience in integrative medicine, Dr. Chen specializes in combining traditional healing practices with modern medical approaches to create personalized wellness plans that address the root causes of health concerns.
settings.expert_2_description: A registered dietitian and certified nutritionist, Michael helps clients develop sustainable eating habits that support long-term health and vitality through evidence-based nutrition strategies and personalized meal planning.
settings.expert_3_description: Licensed massage therapist and certified wellness coach, Emma brings a holistic approach to stress management and physical recovery through therapeutic bodywork, mindfulness practices, and lifestyle optimization.
settings.expert_4_description: With a doctorate in exercise physiology, Dr. Wilson designs evidence-based fitness programs that enhance physical performance, promote longevity, and support overall wellness through movement and recovery protocols.
